---
title: "Tutira + Cyclone Gabrielle 2026"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Libraries

```{r, message = FALSE}
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(osmdata)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(ggpubr)
library(rLakeAnalyzer) 
library(LakeMetabolizer)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(cowplot)
library(zoo)
library(slider)
library(ggridges)
library(mgcv)
library(stats)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(rlang)
library(patchwork)
```

# Data

```{r}
#profiles
Tutira_Pro <- read.csv(file = "Tutira_201807-202601_profiles.csv") #
Tutira_Pro$Lake <- 'Tutira'

Tutira_Pro1<- Tutira_Pro
Tutira_Pro1$DateTime <- ifelse(
  grepl("^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$", Tutira_Pro1$DateTime),  # if only date, no time
  paste0(Tutira_Pro1$DateTime, " 00:00:00"),              # add time
  Tutira_Pro1$DateTime                                     # leave as-is
)
Tutira_Pro1$Date <- format(as.Date(Tutira_Pro1$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d', tz= "UTC"), format = '%Y-%m-%d')
Tutira_Pro1$Date <- as.Date(Tutira_Pro1$Date)
Tutira_Pro1$Time <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Pro1$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S',tz="UTC"), format = '%H:%M')
Tutira_Pro1$Hour <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Pro1$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S',tz="UTC"), format = '%H:00')
Tutira_Pro1$DateTime <- as.POSIXct(Tutira_Pro1$DateTime, format = '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = "UTC")
Tutira_Pro1$Month <- months(Tutira_Pro1$Date)
Tutira_Pro1$Year <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Pro1$Date, '%Y-%m-%d',tz="UTC"), format = '%Y')
Tutira_Pro1$Datetime <- as.POSIXct(paste(Tutira_Pro1$Date, Tutira_Pro1$Hour),format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M', tz='UTC')
Tutira_Pro1$MD <- as.Date(paste0("2000-", format(as.Date(Tutira_Pro1$Date), "%m-%d")))
Tutira_Pro1$MDT <- as.POSIXct(paste0("2000-", format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Pro1$DateTime), "%m-%d %H:%M")),format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M",tz = "UTC")

Tutira_Pro1 <- Tutira_Pro1 %>%
  filter(Year != 2026)

#meteorological
Tutira_Met <- read.csv(file = "Tutira_201807-202601_meteorology.csv") 

Tutira_Met1<- Tutira_Met
Tutira_Met1$DateTime <- ifelse(
  grepl("^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$", Tutira_Met1$DateTime),  # if only date, no time
  paste0(Tutira_Met1$DateTime, " 00:00:00"),              # add time
  Tutira_Met1$DateTime                                     # leave as-is
)
Tutira_Met1$Date <- format(as.Date(Tutira_Met1$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d', tz= "UTC"), format = '%Y-%m-%d')
Tutira_Met1$Date <- as.Date(Tutira_Met1$Date)
Tutira_Met1$Time <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Met1$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S',tz="UTC"), format = '%H:%M')
Tutira_Met1$Hour <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Met1$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S',tz="UTC"), format = '%H:00')
Tutira_Met1$DateTime <- as.POSIXct(Tutira_Met1$DateTime, format = '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = "UTC")
Tutira_Met1$Month <- months(Tutira_Met1$Date)
Tutira_Met1$Year <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Met1$Date, '%Y-%m-%d',tz="UTC"), format = '%Y')
Tutira_Met1$datetime <- as.POSIXct(paste(Tutira_Met1$Date, Tutira_Met1$Hour),format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M',tz = 'UTC')
Tutira_Met1$MD <- as.Date(paste0("2000-", format(as.Date(Tutira_Met1$Date), "%m-%d")))
Tutira_Met1$MDT <- as.POSIXct(paste0("2000-", format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_Met1$DateTime), "%m-%d %H:%M")),format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M",tz = "UTC")

Tutira_Met2 <- Tutira_Met1%>%
  mutate(WndSpd = WndSpd/1.944) %>%#converts from knots to m/s
  filter(Year != 2026)
```

## Profiles

```{r}
Tutira_Pro2 <- Tutira_Pro1%>%
  mutate(Depth = case_when(
    DptSns <= 0.5 ~ 0,
    DptSns > 0.5 & DptSns <=1.5 ~ 1,
    DptSns > 1.5 & DptSns <=2.5 ~ 2,
    DptSns > 2.5 & DptSns <=3.5 ~ 3,
    DptSns > 3.5 & DptSns <=4.5 ~ 4,
    DptSns > 4.5 & DptSns <=5.5 ~ 5,
    DptSns > 5.5 & DptSns <=6.5 ~ 6,
    DptSns > 6.5 & DptSns <=7.5 ~ 7,
    DptSns > 7.5 & DptSns <=8.5 ~ 8,
    DptSns > 8.5 & DptSns <=9.5 ~ 9,
    DptSns > 9.5 & DptSns <=10.5 ~ 10,
    DptSns > 10.5 & DptSns <=11.5 ~ 11,
    DptSns > 11.5 & DptSns <=12.5 ~ 12,
    DptSns > 12.5 & DptSns <=13.5 ~ 13,
    DptSns > 13.5 & DptSns <=14.5 ~ 14,
    DptSns > 14.5 & DptSns <=15.5 ~ 15,
    DptSns > 15.5 & DptSns <=16.5 ~ 16,
    DptSns > 16.5 & DptSns <=17.5 ~ 17,
    DptSns > 17.5 & DptSns <=18.5 ~ 18,
    DptSns > 18.5 & DptSns <=19.5 ~ 19,
    DptSns > 19.5 & DptSns <=20.5 ~ 20,
    DptSns > 20.5 & DptSns <=21.5 ~ 21,
    DptSns > 21.5 & DptSns <=22.5 ~ 22,
    DptSns > 22.5 & DptSns <=23.5 ~ 23,
    DptSns > 23.5 & DptSns <=24.5 ~ 24,
    DptSns > 24.5 & DptSns <=25.5 ~ 25,
    DptSns > 25.5 & DptSns <=26.5 ~ 26,
    DptSns > 26.5 & DptSns <=27.5 ~ 27,
    DptSns > 27.5 & DptSns <=28.5 ~ 28,
    DptSns > 28.5 & DptSns <=29.5 ~ 29,
    DptSns > 29.5 & DptSns <=30.5 ~ 30,
    DptSns > 30.5 & DptSns <=31.5 ~ 31,
    DptSns > 31.5 & DptSns <=32.5 ~ 32,
    DptSns > 32.5 & DptSns <=33.5 ~ 33,
    DptSns > 33.5 & DptSns <=34.5 ~ 34,
    DptSns > 34.5 & DptSns <=35.5 ~ 35,
    DptSns > 35.5 & DptSns <=36.5 ~ 36,
    DptSns > 36.5 & DptSns <=37.5 ~ 37,
    DptSns > 37.5 & DptSns <=38.5 ~ 38,
    DptSns > 38.5 & DptSns <=39.5 ~ 39,
    DptSns > 39.5 & DptSns <=40.5 ~ 40
  ))%>%
  group_by(DateTime,Date,Hour,MD,Month,Year,Lake, Depth, DptSns)%>%
  #group_by(Datetime, Date, Hour, MD, MDT, Month, Year, Depth)%>%
  dplyr::summarise_at(vars('TmpWtr':'TmpDif'),mean,na.rm=TRUE)%>%
  ungroup()

ok_profiles <- Tutira_Pro2 %>% 
  #filter(!is.na(DateTime))%>%
  arrange(DateTime)%>%
  dplyr::select(DateTime, DptSns, Depth, TmpWtr)

# 2. give every profile a unique id: a new one begins whenever depth == 0
# ok_profiles <- ok_profiles %>% 
#   mutate(profile_id = cumsum(Depth <=1))

ok_profiles <- ok_profiles%>%
    mutate(
    new_profile_flag = Depth < lag(Depth, default = first(Depth)),  # TRUE at cast start
    profile_id       = cumsum(new_profile_flag) + 1                # 1, 2, 3, …
  )

# 4. pick one time‑stamp per profile – here: time of the surface reading
profiles <- ok_profiles %>%
  group_by(profile_id, Depth) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    TmpWtr      = mean(TmpWtr, na.rm = TRUE),   # one temperature per depth
    DateTimeBeg = min(DateTime),                # first tick of that cast
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(profile_id, Depth)

profile_times <- ok_profiles %>% 
  arrange(profile_id, DateTime) %>%          # make sure rows are in order
  group_by(profile_id) %>%                   
  dplyr::summarise(DateTime = first(DateTime),      # or DateTime = min(DateTime)
            .groups = "drop")                # drop the grouping
```

## Interpolation - 60 days

```{r}
Tutira_interp <- Tutira_Pro2 %>%
  left_join(ok_profiles, by = c('DateTime', 'Depth', 'TmpWtr', 'DptSns')) %>%
  dplyr::select(profile_id, Depth, TmpWtr:FlPhyc) %>%
  group_by(profile_id, Depth)%>%
  dplyr::summarise_at(vars('TmpWtr':'FlPhyc'),mean,na.rm=TRUE)%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  complete(profile_id, Depth = 1:38) %>%
  arrange(profile_id, Depth)%>%
  left_join(profile_times, by = 'profile_id')%>%
  mutate(DateTime = lubridate::round_date(DateTime, unit = "hour")) %>%
  distinct(DateTime, Depth, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(Depth) %>%
  complete(DateTime = seq(min(DateTime), max(DateTime), by = "1 hour")) %>%
  arrange(Depth, DateTime)%>%
  ungroup() %>%
  # Preserve original profile_id
  mutate(profile_orig = profile_id) %>%
  # Fill downward
  group_by(Depth) %>%
  tidyr::fill(profile_orig, .direction = "down") %>%
  # Add 0.5 only to rows that were originally NA
  mutate(profile_id = ifelse(is.na(profile_id), profile_orig + 0.5, profile_orig)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(-profile_orig)

#finding out missing number of observations
Tutira_interp_daily <- Tutira_interp %>%
  mutate(Date = format(as.Date(DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d', tz= "UTC"), format = '%Y-%m-%d'),
  Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%
  group_by(Date, Depth) %>%
  dplyr::summarise_at(vars('TmpWtr':'FlPhyc'),mean,na.rm=TRUE)%>%
  ungroup()
  
total_values_all  <- prod(dim(Tutira_interp_daily))
missing_values_all <- sum(is.na(Tutira_interp_daily))

percent_missing_all <- (missing_values_all / total_values_all) * 100
percent_missing_all

#for each individual variable
Tutira_missing_var <- Tutira_interp_daily %>%
  dplyr::select(TmpWtr:FlPhyc) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(),
                   list(
                     Missing_n = ~ sum(is.na(.)),
                     Percent_Missing = ~ mean(is.na(.)) * 100
                   )))

# Define the variables to interpolate
vars_to_interp <- c("TmpWtr","DOconc","DOpsat","pH","Cond","SpCond","TurbRT","FlChlr","FlPhyc")

# ----- 1. Hourly interpolation -----
#safe_hour_interp <- function(x, datetime, max_gap_hours = 168) { #7 days
#safe_hour_interp <- function(x, datetime, max_gap_hours = 336) { #14 days
#safe_hour_interp <- function(x, datetime, max_gap_hours = 744) { #31 days
safe_hour_interp <- function(x, datetime, max_gap_hours = 1440) { #60 days
  if (sum(!is.na(x)) < 2) return(x)
  
  # Interpolate
  interp <- zoo::na.approx(x, x = as.numeric(datetime), na.rm = FALSE, rule = 2)
  
  # Mask sequences exceeding max_gap
  na_idx <- which(is.na(x))
  if (length(na_idx) > 0) {
    r <- rle(is.na(x))
    idx <- 1
    mask <- rep(FALSE, length(x))
    for (i in seq_along(r$lengths)) {
      if (r$values[i] & r$lengths[i] > max_gap_hours) {
        mask[idx:(idx + r$lengths[i]-1)] <- TRUE
      }
      idx <- idx + r$lengths[i]
    }
    interp[mask] <- NA
  }
  return(interp)
}

Tutira_hourly <- Tutira_interp %>%
  group_by(Depth) %>%
  arrange(DateTime) %>%
  # Ensure full hourly sequence per depth
  complete(DateTime = seq(min(DateTime), max(DateTime), by = "1 hour")) %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(vars_to_interp), 
                ~ safe_hour_interp(.x, DateTime),
                .names = "{.col}_hourInterp")) %>%
  ungroup()

# ----- 2. Depth-wise interpolation -----
safe_depth_interp <- function(x, depth) {
  if (sum(!is.na(x)) < 2) return(x)  # must have at least 2 values
  # Interpolate across all depths, allow extrapolation
  zoo::na.approx(x, x = depth, na.rm = FALSE, rule = 2)
}

Tutira_interp_depth <- Tutira_hourly %>%
  group_by(profile_id) %>%
  arrange(Depth) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_hourInterp"), 
                ~ safe_depth_interp(.x, Depth),
                .names = "{.col}_depthInterp")) %>%
  ungroup()

Tutira_interp2 <- Tutira_interp_depth%>%
  dplyr::select(DateTime, profile_id, Depth, ends_with("_hourInterp_depthInterp")) %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ gsub("_hourInterp_depthInterp$", "", .x),
    ends_with("_hourInterp_depthInterp")
  )

Tutira_interp2$Date <- format(as.Date(Tutira_interp2$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d', tz= "UTC"), format = '%Y-%m-%d')
Tutira_interp2$Date <- as.Date(Tutira_interp2$Date)
Tutira_interp2$Time <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_interp2$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S',tz="UTC"), format = '%H:%M')
Tutira_interp2$Hour <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_interp2$DateTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S',tz="UTC"), format = '%H:00')
Tutira_interp2$DateTime <- as.POSIXct(Tutira_interp2$DateTime, format = '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S', tz = "UTC")
Tutira_interp2$Month <- months(Tutira_interp2$Date)
Tutira_interp2$Year <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_interp2$Date, '%Y-%m-%d',tz="UTC"), format = '%Y')
Tutira_interp2$datetime <- as.POSIXct(paste(Tutira_interp2$Date, Tutira_interp2$Hour),format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M', tz = 'UTC')
Tutira_interp2$MD <- as.Date(paste0("2000-", format(as.Date(Tutira_interp2$Date), "%m-%d")))
Tutira_interp2$MDT <- as.POSIXct(paste0("2000-", format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_interp2$datetime), "%m-%d %H:%M")),format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M",tz = "UTC")

#removing weird chlorophyll values
Tutira_interp2 <- Tutira_interp2 %>%
  mutate(FlChlr = case_when(
    ((datetime >= as.POSIXct("2020-02-07 15:00:00") &
    datetime <= as.POSIXct("2020-02-13 13:00:00")) |
    (datetime >= as.POSIXct("2020-02-13 15:00:00") &
    datetime <= as.POSIXct("2020-02-27 08:00:00"))) &
    Depth == 1 ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE ~ FlChlr
  ))

#adding in max algal peak depth
Tutira_AlgalPeak <- Tutira_interp2 %>% 
  group_by(datetime) %>% 
  mutate( 
    Depth_max_FlChlr = if (all(is.na(FlChlr))) NA_real_ else Depth[which.max(FlChlr)], 
    Depth_max_FlPhyc = if (all(is.na(FlPhyc))) NA_real_ else Depth[which.max(FlPhyc)] ) %>% 
  ungroup()

#adding in anoxic depth
Tutira_Anoxic <- Tutira_interp2 %>%
  group_by(datetime) %>%
  mutate(
    Anoxic_Depth = case_when(
      all(is.na(DOconc)) ~ NA_real_,                             # no DO values
      any(!is.na(DOconc) & DOconc <= 2) ~ min(Depth[DOconc <= 2], na.rm = TRUE),  # first anoxic depth
      TRUE ~ 38                                                   # DO exists but none ≤ 2
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

#temperature profiles
Tutira_ProfileWide <- Tutira_interp2 %>% 
  dplyr::select(datetime, Depth, TmpWtr)%>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from   = Depth,
    names_prefix = "wtr_",      # adds “wtr_”
    names_sort   = TRUE,        # numeric sort (because Depth is numeric)
    values_from  = TmpWtr
  )%>%
  drop_na()
```

## rlakeanalyzer

```{r}
#changing format of temperature file, so I don't have to save it everytime I have more data
ok_wide_iso <- Tutira_ProfileWide %>%
  mutate(datetime = format(datetime, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"))

# Step 2: Convert to character matrix for full control
char_mat <- apply(ok_wide_iso, 2, as.character)

# Step 3: Build tab-separated lines manually
header <- paste(colnames(ok_wide_iso), collapse = "\t")
rows <- apply(char_mat, 1, function(x) paste(x, collapse = "\t"))
txt_lines <- c(header, rows)

# Step 4: Feed to load.ts() via in-memory text connection
con <- textConnection(txt_lines, "r")
Tutira.wtr <- load.ts(con)
close(con)

Tutira.wtr$datetime <- as.POSIXct(
  format(Tutira_ProfileWide$datetime, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
  format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ",
  tz = "UTC"
)

str(Tutira.wtr)
#Find other parameters in rLakeAnalyzer
t.d_Tutira = ts.thermo.depth(Tutira.wtr) ## pulls out calculated thermocline depth

t.d_Tutira_replace <- t.d_Tutira%>%
  mutate(across(
    where(is.numeric),               # only numeric columns can hold NaN
    ~ replace(.x, is.nan(.x), 38)    # swap NaN → 29
  ))

#Schmidt stability
Tutira_bathy <- "Tutira_bathy.txt"
Tutira.bth = load.bathy(Tutira_bathy)
S.S_Tutira = ts.schmidt.stability(Tutira.wtr,Tutira.bth, na.rm = FALSE)

#Lake Number
Tutira_Wnd <- Tutira_Met2%>%
  dplyr::select(c(datetime, WndSpd))%>%
  group_by(datetime)%>%
  dplyr::summarise_at(vars('WndSpd'),mean,na.rm=TRUE)%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  rename(wnd_1.0 = WndSpd)%>%
  drop_na()

Tutira_wnd_1 <- Tutira_Wnd %>%
  mutate(datetime = format(datetime, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"))

# Step 2: Convert to character matrix for full control
char_mat <- apply(Tutira_wnd_1, 2, as.character)

# Step 3: Build tab-separated lines manually
header <- paste(colnames(Tutira_wnd_1), collapse = "\t")
rows <- apply(char_mat, 1, function(x) paste(x, collapse = "\t"))
txt_lines <- c(header, rows)

# Step 4: Feed to load.ts() via in-memory text connection
con <- textConnection(txt_lines, "r")
Tutira.wnd <- load.ts(con)
close(con)

Tutira.wnd$datetime <- as.POSIXct(
  format(Tutira_Wnd$datetime, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
  format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ",
  tz = "UTC"
)

Tutira_LN <- ts.lake.number(Tutira.wtr,Tutira.wnd,2,Tutira.bth,seasonal=TRUE)

#Metalimion depths
Tutira_MD <- ts.meta.depths(Tutira.wtr, slope = 0.1)
Tutira_MD <- Tutira_MD%>%
  rename(Meta_Top = top)%>%
  rename(Meta_Bottom = bottom)

#Brunt-Vaisala frequency
Tutira_BF <- ts.buoyancy.freq(Tutira.wtr)
Tutira_BF <- Tutira_BF%>%
  rename(Buoyancy = n2)

force_timezone <- function(df, tz = "UTC") {
  # Convert to character to preserve displayed clock time
  df$datetime <- as.POSIXct(format(df$datetime, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), tz = tz)
  return(df)
}

datasets <- list(Tutira_AlgalPeak, Tutira_Anoxic, t.d_Tutira_replace, S.S_Tutira, Tutira_LN, Tutira_MD, Tutira_BF)
datasets <- lapply(datasets, force_timezone, tz = "UTC")

Tutira_AlgalPeak      <- datasets[[1]]
Tutira_Anoxic <- datasets[[2]]
t.d_Tutira_replace <- datasets[[3]]
S.S_Tutira         <- datasets[[4]]
Tutira_LN          <- datasets[[5]]
Tutira_MD          <- datasets[[6]]
Tutira_BF          <- datasets[[7]]

Tutira_data3 <- Tutira_AlgalPeak%>%
  #mutate(datetime = as.POSIXct(datetime, tz = "UTC"))%>%
  left_join(
    Tutira_Anoxic %>% dplyr::select(datetime, Depth, Anoxic_Depth),
    by = c("datetime", "Depth"), relationship = "many-to-many"
  )%>%
  left_join(t.d_Tutira_replace, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(S.S_Tutira, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(Tutira_LN, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(Tutira_MD, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(Tutira_BF, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")

#replacing
Tutira_LN1 <- Tutira_LN%>%
  mutate(lake.number = coalesce(lake.number, 0))

Tutira_BF1 <- Tutira_BF%>%
  mutate(Buoyancy = coalesce(Buoyancy, 0))

Tutira_MD1 <- Tutira_MD%>%
  mutate(Meta_Top = coalesce(Meta_Top, 0), Meta_Bottom = coalesce(Meta_Bottom, 38))

datasets <- list(Tutira_AlgalPeak, Tutira_Anoxic, t.d_Tutira_replace, S.S_Tutira, Tutira_LN1, Tutira_MD1, Tutira_BF1)
datasets <- lapply(datasets, force_timezone, tz = "UTC")

Tutira_AlgalPeak      <- datasets[[1]]
Tutira_Anoxic <- datasets[[2]]
t.d_Tutira_replace <- datasets[[3]]
S.S_Tutira         <- datasets[[4]]
Tutira_LN1          <- datasets[[5]]
Tutira_MD1          <- datasets[[6]]
Tutira_BF1          <- datasets[[7]]

Tutira_data3_replace <- Tutira_AlgalPeak %>%
  left_join(
    Tutira_Anoxic %>% dplyr::select(datetime, Depth, Anoxic_Depth),
    by = c("datetime", "Depth"), relationship = "many-to-many"
  )%>%
  left_join(t.d_Tutira_replace, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(S.S_Tutira, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(Tutira_LN1, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(Tutira_MD1, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")%>%
  left_join(Tutira_BF1, by = 'datetime', relationship = "many-to-one")
```

## Storm identification

```{r}
#Tutira
Tutira_storm <- Tutira_Met2 %>%
  arrange(DateTime) %>%
  mutate(
    # thresholds
    PrBaro_10th = quantile(PrBaro, 0.10, na.rm = TRUE),
    WS_85th    = quantile(WndSpd, 0.85, na.rm = TRUE),
    Rain_P  = PpRain > 0,
    # event flags
    PrBaro_event = PrBaro <= PrBaro_10th,
    WS_event     = WndSpd >= WS_85th,
    Rain_event   = Rain_P == TRUE,
    All_event    = PrBaro_event & WS_event & Rain_event,   # ALL must be true
    All_event_end    = PrBaro_event & WS_event
    #All_event    = PrBaro_event & Rain_event   # ALL must be true
  )%>%
  filter(Year == 2023, Month == "February") %>%
  mutate(
    first_during_time = min(DateTime[All_event], na.rm = TRUE),
        last_during_time = {
      r <- rle(All_event_end)
      # Find indices where a run of TRUE is at least length 4 (20 minutes)
      idx <- which(r$values & r$lengths >= 4)
      if (length(idx) == 0) {
        NA  # no qualifying run
      } else {
        # cumulative lengths to find the ending position of the run
        cum_lengths <- cumsum(r$lengths)
        # end index of last qualifying run
        end_idx <- cum_lengths[idx[length(idx)]]
        DateTime[end_idx]
      }
    }
  )

#combines Storm timing with Profile
Tutira_Cyclone_Pro <- Tutira_data3_replace %>%
  mutate(
    first_during_time = Tutira_storm$first_during_time[1],
    last_during_time  = Tutira_storm$last_during_time[1]
  )%>%
  distinct(datetime, Depth, .keep_all = TRUE) #data has multiple rows with same information (idk why)
```

## Mean +- 95% Confidence Interval - non normal

### Structural

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1. Create daily dataset
# -----------------------------
Tutira_Cyclone_Pro_Day <- Tutira_Cyclone_Pro%>%
  group_by(Date, Month, Year, MD, Depth, first_during_time, last_during_time)%>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(TmpWtr:FlPhyc, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()

# -----------------------------
# 2. Create full hourly time grid
# -----------------------------
full_hours <- seq(
  as.POSIXct("2018-01-01", tz = "UTC"),
  as.POSIXct("2025-12-31", tz = "UTC"),
  by = "1 day"
)

# -----------------------------
# 3. Fill dataset for all depths × hours
# -----------------------------
Tutira_filled_Depth <- expand_grid(
  Depth = unique(Tutira_Cyclone_Pro_Day$Depth),
  Date = full_hours
) %>%
  left_join(Tutira_Cyclone_Pro_Day, by = c("Depth", "Date")) %>%
  arrange(Depth, Date) %>%
  mutate(
    Date     = as.Date(Date),
    Month    = month(Date, label = TRUE),
    Year     = year(Date),
    DOY      = yday(Date),
    MD       = as.Date(paste0("2000-", month(Date), "-", day(Date)))
  )

# -----------------------------
# 3. Define target variables
# -----------------------------
set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility

# 1️⃣ Pivot longer to make variables in one column
# Long data (yours)
Tutira_long <- Tutira_filled_Depth %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(TmpWtr, DOconc, DOpsat, pH, Cond, SpCond, TurbRT, FlChlr, FlPhyc),
    names_to = "Variable",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

# Bootstrap function (safe)
bootstrap_ci <- function(x, nboot = 1000, conf = 0.95) {
  x <- na.omit(x)
  if (length(x) < 2) {
    # return consistent structure with NAs
    return(tibble(mean = mean(x), lower = NA_real_, upper = NA_real_))
  }
  boot_means <- replicate(nboot, mean(sample(x, replace = TRUE)))
  alpha <- (1 - conf) / 2
  ci <- quantile(boot_means, probs = c(alpha, 1 - alpha))
  tibble(mean = mean(x), lower = ci[1], upper = ci[2])
}

# Apply bootstrap summarizing by depth × variable
Tutira_boot_summary <- Tutira_long %>%
  group_by(DOY, Depth, Variable) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(Value)),
    ci = list(bootstrap_ci(Value, nboot = 1000)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  unnest_wider(ci) %>%  # expands mean/lower/upper into separate columns
  dplyr::select(DOY, Depth, Variable, n, mean, lower, upper)

Tutira_boot_long <- Tutira_boot_summary%>%
  dplyr::select(-n)%>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Variable,
    values_from = c(mean, lower, upper),
    names_glue = "{Variable}_{.value}"
  )
  
# -----------------------------
# 5. Join with main data and compute residuals/percent differences
# -----------------------------
Tutira_full_Depth <- Tutira_filled_Depth %>%
  left_join(Tutira_boot_long, by = c("Depth", "DOY"))


#making first and last storm times be present throughout entire dataset
Tutira_full_Depth <- Tutira_full_Depth %>%
  mutate(
    first_during_time = coalesce(first_during_time, first(na.omit(first_during_time))),
    last_during_time  = coalesce(last_during_time,  first(na.omit(last_during_time)))
  )
```

### Functional

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1. Create daily dataset
# -----------------------------
Tutira_Cyclone_Pro_ND <- Tutira_Cyclone_Pro %>%
  group_by(Date, Month, Year, MD, first_during_time, last_during_time) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(Depth_max_FlChlr:Buoyancy, ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  ungroup()

# -----------------------------
# 2. Create full hourly time grid
# -----------------------------
full_hours <- seq(
  as.POSIXct("2018-01-01", tz = "UTC"),
  as.POSIXct("2025-12-31", tz = "UTC"),
  by = "1 day"
)

# -----------------------------
# 3. Fill dataset for all depths × hours
# -----------------------------
Tutira_filled_ND <- expand_grid(
  Date = full_hours
) %>%
  left_join(Tutira_Cyclone_Pro_ND, by = c("Date")) %>%
  arrange(Date) %>%
  mutate(
    Date     = as.Date(Date),
    Month    = month(Date, label = TRUE),
    Year     = year(Date),
    DOY      = yday(Date),
    MD       = as.Date(paste0("2000-", month(Date), "-", day(Date)))
  )

# -----------------------------
# 3. Define target variables
# -----------------------------
set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility

# 1️⃣ Pivot longer to make variables in one column
# Long data (yours)
Tutira_long_ND <- Tutira_filled_ND %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(Depth_max_FlChlr, Depth_max_FlPhyc, Anoxic_Depth, thermo.depth, schmidt.stability, lake.number, Meta_Top, Meta_Bottom, Buoyancy),
    names_to = "Variable",
    values_to = "Value"
  )

# Bootstrap function (safe)
bootstrap_ci <- function(x, nboot = 1000, conf = 0.95) {
  x <- na.omit(x)
  if (length(x) < 2) {
    # return consistent structure with NAs
    return(tibble(mean = mean(x), lower = NA_real_, upper = NA_real_))
  }
  boot_means <- replicate(nboot, mean(sample(x, replace = TRUE)))
  alpha <- (1 - conf) / 2
  ci <- quantile(boot_means, probs = c(alpha, 1 - alpha))
  tibble(mean = mean(x), lower = ci[1], upper = ci[2])
}

# Apply bootstrap summarizing by depth × variable
Tutira_boot_summary_ND <- Tutira_long_ND %>%
  group_by(DOY, Variable) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(Value)),
    ci = list(bootstrap_ci(Value, nboot = 1000)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  unnest_wider(ci) %>%  # expands mean/lower/upper into separate columns
  dplyr::select(DOY, Variable, n, mean, lower, upper)

Tutira_boot_long_ND <- Tutira_boot_summary_ND%>%
  dplyr::select(-n)%>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Variable,
    values_from = c(mean, lower, upper),
    names_glue = "{Variable}_{.value}"
  )
  
# -----------------------------
# 5. Join with main data and compute residuals/percent differences
# -----------------------------
Tutira_full_ND <- Tutira_filled_ND %>%
  left_join(Tutira_boot_long_ND, by = "DOY")


#making first and last storm times be present throughout entire dataset
Tutira_full_ND <- Tutira_full_ND %>%
  mutate(
    first_during_time = coalesce(first_during_time, first(na.omit(first_during_time))),
    last_during_time  = coalesce(last_during_time,  first(na.omit(last_during_time)))
  )
```

## Recovery

### Structural

```{r}
# 1️⃣Rename
Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_Depths <- Tutira_full_Depth

# 2️⃣ Target variables
vars <- c("TmpWtr", "DOconc", "DOpsat", "pH",
          "Cond", "SpCond", "TurbRT", "FlChlr", "FlPhyc")

# 3️⃣ Filter to post-storm period
start_time <- min(as.Date(Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_Depths$last_during_time), na.rm = TRUE)

df_check <- Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_Depths %>%
  filter(Date >= start_time)

# 3 Get max thermo.depth value from the non-depth dataset
max_thermo <- max(Tutira_full_ND$thermo.depth, na.rm = TRUE)

# 4 Create recovered columns based on 95% CI, with thermo rule applied
for (v in vars) {
  recovered <- df_check[[v]] >= df_check[[paste0(v, "_lower")]] &
               df_check[[v]] <= df_check[[paste0(v, "_upper")]]

  # Apply thermo.depth rule:
  # For all dates when the lake's thermocline is at its max, mark as not recovered
  if (!is.na(max_thermo)) {
    # Find the dates in the non-depth dataset when thermo.depth == max_thermo
    max_thermo_dates <- Tutira_full_ND %>%
      filter(thermo.depth == max_thermo) %>%
      pull(Date) %>%
      unique()

    recovered[df_check$Date %in% max_thermo_dates] <- FALSE
  }

  df_check[[paste0("recovered_", v)]] <- recovered
}

# 5️⃣ Rolling 2-day check
daily_recovery <- df_check %>%
  group_by(Depth) %>%
  arrange(Date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      starts_with("recovered_"),
      ~ rollapply(.x, width = 2, FUN = all, fill = NA, align = "right"),
      .names = "{.col}_2days"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# 6️⃣ First recovery date per Depth × Variable
first_recovery <- daily_recovery %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = ends_with("_2days"),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "recovered"
  ) %>%
  group_by(variable, Depth) %>%
  filter(recovered == TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    recovery_date = min(Date, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(variable = sub("_2days$", "", variable), variable = sub("^recovered_", "", variable))%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = recovery_date, names_prefix = "first_recovery_")

# 7️⃣ Join back to main dataset
Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_Depths <- Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_Depths %>%
  left_join(first_recovery, by = "Depth")
```

### Functional

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1. Create DOY
# -----------------------------
Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND <- Tutira_full_ND%>%
  mutate(DOY = yday(Date))
  
# -----------------------------
# 2. Define target variables
# -----------------------------
vars <- c("Depth_max_FlChlr", "Depth_max_FlPhyc", "Anoxic_Depth", "thermo.depth",
          "schmidt.stability", "lake.number", "Meta_Top", "Meta_Bottom", "Buoyancy")

# ----------------------------
# 3. Post-storm recovery check by Depth
# ----------------------------

start_time <- min(as.Date(Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND$last_during_time), na.rm = TRUE)
start_time <- as.Date(start_time)

# Step 1: create recovered_* columns dynamically
df_check <- Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND %>%
  filter(Date >= start_time)

# Find the max thermo.depth for comparison
max_thermo <- max(Tutira_full_ND$thermo.depth, na.rm = TRUE)

for (v in vars) {
  # Standard recovery condition
  recovered <- df_check[[v]] >= df_check[[paste0(v, "_lower")]] &
               df_check[[v]] <= df_check[[paste0(v, "_upper")]]

  # Special rule: if variable is thermo.depth and it's at its max, mark as not recovered
  if (v == "thermo.depth") {
    recovered[df_check$thermo.depth == max_thermo] <- FALSE
  }

  # Store back in df
  df_check[[paste0("recovered_", v)]] <- recovered
}
  
daily_recovery <- df_check %>%
  #group_by(Depth) %>%                # or group_by(Depth) if needed
  arrange(Date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      starts_with("recovered_"),
      ~ rollapply(.x, width = 2, FUN = all, fill = NA, align = "right"),
      .names = "{.col}_2days"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      starts_with("recovered_"),
      ~ if_else(thermo.depth == max_thermo, FALSE, .x)
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
  
first_recovery <- daily_recovery %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = ends_with("_2days"),
    names_to = "variable",
    values_to = "recovered"
  ) %>%
  group_by(variable) %>%
  filter(recovered == TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    recovery_date = min(Date, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

first_recovery_clean <- first_recovery %>%
  mutate(variable = sub("_2days$", "", variable), variable = sub("^recovered_", "", variable) )%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = recovery_date, names_prefix = "first_recovery_")

# Join back to main dataset
Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND <- bind_cols(Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND, first_recovery_clean)

write.csv(Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND,"Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## Resilience and Resistance

### Structural

```{r}
Tutira_D_WT <- Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_Depths

vars <- c("TmpWtr", "DOconc", "DOpsat", "pH", "FlChlr", "FlPhyc", "Cond", "SpCond", "TurbRT")

#resistance
#pulls out maximum disturbance values per depth
Tutira_D_WT_during <- Tutira_D_WT %>%
  filter(Date >= first_during_time & Date <= last_during_time) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(vars), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("_mean"), names_to = "MeanVar", values_to = "MeanValue") %>%
  filter(substr(MeanVar, 1, nchar(MeanVar) - 5) == Variable) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("first_recovery_"), names_to = "RecoveryVar", values_to = "first_recovery", names_prefix = "first_recovery_")%>%
  filter(RecoveryVar == Variable)%>%
  group_by(Depth, Variable) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(Value - MeanValue), n = 1)%>%
  mutate(
    P0 = Value,
    C0 = MeanValue,
    t0 = Date,
    D0 = P0 - C0,
    RTB = as.numeric(first_recovery - t0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Depth, Variable, P0, C0, t0, D0, RTB, first_recovery)

#calculates RS
Tutira_D_WT_RS <- Tutira_D_WT_during%>%
  group_by(Depth, Variable)%>%
  mutate(RS = 1-((2*abs(D0))/(abs(D0) + C0)))

#calculates magnitude for each time point then average
Tutira_D_WT_RL <- bind_rows(
  lapply(vars, function(var) {
    # dynamically get the first recovery time column for this variable
    recovery_col <- paste0("first_recovery_", var)
    recovery_time <- Tutira_D_WT[[recovery_col]][1]  # assuming same for all depths

    # select relevant columns
    Tutira_D_WT %>%
      select(Depth, Date, all_of(var), all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      rename(Value = all_of(var),
             MeanValue = all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      filter(Date >= recovery_time - hours(72) &
             Date <= recovery_time + hours(72)) %>%
      group_by(Depth) %>%
      mutate(Di = Value - MeanValue) %>%   # deviation at each timestamp
      summarise(
        Px = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),       # mean observed
        Cx = mean(MeanValue, na.rm = TRUE),   # mean baseline
        Dx = mean(abs(Di), na.rm = TRUE),     # mean magnitude of deviation
        tx = mean(Date)                        # midpoint of window
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Variable = var)
  })
)

#merges datasets
Tutira_D_WT_RSRL <- Tutira_D_WT_RS%>%
  left_join(Tutira_D_WT_RL %>% dplyr::select(c(Depth, Variable, Px, Cx, tx, Dx)), by = c("Depth", "Variable"))

#calculates RL
Tutira_D_WT_RLRS <- Tutira_D_WT_RSRL%>%
  group_by(Depth, Variable)%>%
  mutate(RL = (((2*abs(D0))/(abs(Dx) + abs(D0)))-1),
         RR = ifelse(RTB > 0, (abs(D0) - abs(Dx)) / RTB, NA_real_))

#merges datasets with RS and RL
Tutira_D_WT_p1 <- Tutira_D_WT%>%
  left_join(Tutira_D_WT_RLRS, by = "Depth")

write.csv(Tutira_D_WT_p1,"Tutira_D_WT_p1.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

### Functional

```{r}
Tutira_ND_WT <- Tutira_MeanCI_Daily_Recovery_ND

vars <- c("Depth_max_FlChlr", "Depth_max_FlPhyc", "Anoxic_Depth", "thermo.depth",
          "schmidt.stability", "lake.number", "Meta_Top", "Meta_Bottom", "Buoyancy")

#resistance
#pulls out maximum disturbance values per depth
Tutira_ND_WT_during <- Tutira_ND_WT %>%
  filter(Date >= first_during_time & Date <= last_during_time) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(vars), names_to = "Variable", values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = ends_with("_mean"), names_to = "MeanVar", values_to = "MeanValue") %>%
  filter(substr(MeanVar, 1, nchar(MeanVar) - 5) == Variable) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("first_recovery_"), names_to = "RecoveryVar", values_to = "first_recovery", names_prefix = "first_recovery_")%>%
  filter(RecoveryVar == Variable)%>%
  group_by(Variable) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(Value - MeanValue), n = 1)%>%
  mutate(
    P0 = Value,
    C0 = MeanValue,
    t0 = Date,
    D0 = P0 - C0,
    RTB = as.numeric(first_recovery - t0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(Variable, P0, C0, t0, D0, RTB, first_recovery)

#calculates RS
Tutira_ND_WT_RS <- Tutira_ND_WT_during%>%
  group_by(Variable)%>%
  mutate(RS = 1-((2*abs(D0))/(abs(D0) + C0)))

#calculates magnitude for each time point then average
Tutira_ND_WT_RL <- bind_rows(
  lapply(vars, function(var) {
    # dynamically get the first recovery time column for this variable
    recovery_col <- paste0("first_recovery_", var)
    recovery_time <- Tutira_ND_WT[[recovery_col]][1]  # assuming same for all depths

    # select relevant columns
    Tutira_ND_WT %>%
      dplyr::select(Date, all_of(var), all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      rename(Value = all_of(var),
             MeanValue = all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      filter(Date >= recovery_time - hours(72) &
             Date <= recovery_time + hours(72)) %>%
      mutate(Di = Value - MeanValue) %>%   # deviation at each timestamp
      dplyr::summarise(
        Px = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),       # mean observed
        Cx = mean(MeanValue, na.rm = TRUE),   # mean baseline
        Dx = mean(abs(Di), na.rm = TRUE),     # mean magnitude of deviation
        tx = mean(Date)                        # midpoint of window
      ) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(Variable = var)
  })
)

#merges datasets
Tutira_ND_WT_RSRL <- Tutira_ND_WT_RS%>%
  left_join(Tutira_ND_WT_RL %>% dplyr::select(c(Variable, Px, Cx, tx, Dx)), by = c("Variable"))

#calculates RL
Tutira_ND_WT_RLRS <- Tutira_ND_WT_RSRL%>%
  group_by(Variable)%>%
  mutate(RL = ((2*abs(D0))/(abs(Dx) + abs(D0)))-1,
         RR = ifelse(RTB > 0, (abs(D0) - abs(Dx)) / RTB, NA_real_))

#merges datasets with RS and RL
Tutira_ND_WT_p1 <- Tutira_ND_WT%>%
  merge(Tutira_ND_WT_RLRS)

write.csv(Tutira_ND_WT_p1,"Tutira_ND_WT_p1.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## Rate of Resilience

### Structural

```{r}
vars <- c("TmpWtr", "DOconc", "DOpsat", "pH", "FlChlr", "FlPhyc", "Cond", "SpCond", "TurbRT")

# daily rate of resilience for each variable and depth
Tutira_D_WT_RR_daily <- bind_rows(
  lapply(vars, function(var) {
    
    recovery_col <- paste0("first_recovery_", var)

    # extract recovery times per depth (a tibble)
    depth_recovery <- Tutira_D_WT %>% 
      dplyr::select(Depth, !!recovery_col) %>%
      distinct() %>%
      rename(recovery_time = !!recovery_col)

    # Merge observed + baseline for this variable
    df <- Tutira_D_WT %>%
      filter(Date >= last_during_time) %>%
      dplyr::select(Depth, Date, all_of(var), all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      rename(Value = all_of(var),
             MeanValue = all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      mutate(
        Variable = var,
        Dd = Value - MeanValue
      ) %>%
      left_join(depth_recovery, by = "Depth") %>%
      mutate(
        end_time = recovery_time + hours(72)
      ) %>%
      filter(Date <= end_time)

    # Add t0 and D0
    df <- df %>%
      left_join(
        Tutira_D_WT_during %>% 
          dplyr::select(Depth, Variable, t0, D0),
        by = c("Depth", "Variable")
      )

    # RL for each day
    df %>%
      mutate(
        RL_daily = ((2 * abs(D0)) / (abs(Dd) + abs(D0))) - 1,
        day_since_disturbance = as.numeric(Date - t0, units = "days")
      )
  })
)
```

### Functional

```{r}
vars <- c("Depth_max_FlChlr", "Depth_max_FlPhyc", "Anoxic_Depth", "thermo.depth",
          "schmidt.stability", "lake.number", "Meta_Top", "Meta_Bottom", "Buoyancy")

# daily rate of resilience for each non-depth variable
Tutira_ND_WT_RR_daily <- bind_rows(
  lapply(vars, function(var) {
    
    # recovery time for this variable (only 1 value)
    recovery_col <- paste0("first_recovery_", var)
    recovery_time <- Tutira_ND_WT[[recovery_col]][1]

    # t0 and D0 from the 'during' disturbance period
    t0_D0 <- Tutira_ND_WT_during %>% 
      filter(Variable == var) %>%
      distinct(Variable, t0, D0)

    # observed + baseline series
    df <- Tutira_ND_WT %>%
      filter(Date >= last_during_time &
             Date <= recovery_time + hours(72)) %>%     # recovery window
      dplyr::select(Date, all_of(var), all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      rename(
        Value = all_of(var),
        MeanValue = all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        Variable = var,
        recovery_time = recovery_time,   # add here instead of select()
        Dd = Value - MeanValue        # daily deviation
      ) %>%
      left_join(t0_D0, by = "Variable") %>%
      mutate(
        RL_daily = ((2 * abs(D0)) / (abs(Dd) + abs(D0))) - 1,
        day_since_disturbance = as.numeric(Date - t0, units = "days")
      )

    df
  })
)
```

## Rate of Resilience - till end of data

### Structural

```{r}
vars <- c("TmpWtr", "DOconc", "DOpsat", "pH", "FlChlr", "FlPhyc", "Cond", "SpCond", "TurbRT")

# daily rate of resilience for each variable and depth
Tutira_D_WT_RR_daily_all <- bind_rows(
  lapply(vars, function(var) {
    
    recovery_col <- paste0("first_recovery_", var)

    # extract recovery times per depth (a tibble)
    depth_recovery <- Tutira_D_WT %>% 
      dplyr::select(Depth, !!recovery_col) %>%
      distinct() %>%
      rename(recovery_time = !!recovery_col)

    # Merge observed + baseline for this variable
    df <- Tutira_D_WT %>%
      filter(Date >= last_during_time) %>%
      dplyr::select(Depth, Date, all_of(var), all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      rename(Value = all_of(var),
             MeanValue = all_of(paste0(var, "_mean"))) %>%
      mutate(
        Variable = var,
        Dd = Value - MeanValue
      ) %>%
      left_join(depth_recovery, by = "Depth")
      #mutate(end_time = recovery_time + hours(72)) %>%
      #filter(Date <= end_time)

    # Add t0 and D0
    df <- df %>%
      left_join(
        Tutira_D_WT_during %>% 
          dplyr::select(Depth, Variable, t0, D0),
        by = c("Depth", "Variable")
      )

    # RL for each day
    df %>%
      mutate(
        RL_daily = ((2 * abs(D0)) / (abs(Dd) + abs(D0))) - 1,
        day_since_disturbance = as.numeric(Date - t0, units = "days")
      )
  })
)

Tutira_D_WT_RR_daily_all$MD <- as.Date(paste0("2000-", format(as.Date(Tutira_D_WT_RR_daily_all$Date), "%m-%d")))
Tutira_D_WT_RR_daily_all$Year <- format(as.POSIXct(Tutira_D_WT_RR_daily_all$Date, '%Y-%m-%d',tz="UTC"), format = '%Y')
```
